'''hasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aveyrah|aveyrah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aveyrah|aveyrah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsedeth|hæsedeth]] || [[word:hæsedej|hæsedej]] || [[word:hæsedesh|hæsedesh]] || [[word:hæsede|hæsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasosodoth|hasosodoth]] || [[word:hasosodoj|hasosodoj]] || [[word:hasosodosh|hasosodosh]] || [[word:hasosodo|hasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasodoth|hasodoth]] || [[word:hasodoj|hasodoj]] || [[word:hasodosh|hasodosh]] || [[word:hasodo|hasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasofdoth|hasofdoth]] || [[word:hasofdoj|hasofdoj]] || [[word:hasofdosh|hasofdosh]] || [[word:hasofdof|hasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasodotho|hasodotho]] || [[word:hasodojo|hasodojo]] || [[word:hasodosho|hasodosho]] || [[word:hasodoko|hasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasodoth|hasodoth]] || [[word:hasodoj|hasodoj]] || [[word:hasodosh|hasodosh]] || [[word:hasodo|hasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasodothol|hasodothol]] || [[word:hasodojol|hasodojol]] || [[word:hasodoshol|hasodoshol]] || [[word:hasodokol|hasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasodothotho|hasodothotho]] || [[word:hasodojojo|hasodojojo]] || [[word:hasodoshosho|hasodoshosho]] || [[word:hasodoko|hasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasodothon|hasodothon]] || [[word:hasodojon|hasodojon]] || [[word:hasodoshon|hasodoshon]] || [[word:hasodokon|hasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasodothoro|hasodothoro]] || [[word:hasodojoro|hasodojoro]] || [[word:hasodoshoro|hasodoshoro]] || [[word:hasodokoro|hasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
